Who We Are

Decades of Baltimore Excavation Experience

Mc New Excavating Inc. has been a trusted name in Baltimore excavation for over a decade. Founded by lifelong Maryland residents, we understand the unique challenges of our local terrain and infrastructure.

Our approach is simple: get the job done right, on time, and within budget. We prioritize clear communication, meticulous planning, and unwavering commitment to safety on every project, large or small.

We're proud to be part of the Baltimore community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact, ensuring a sustainable future for our city.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction

Our Difference

Why Choose Mc New Excavating Inc

Local Expertise

Deep understanding of Baltimore's soil conditions, permitting processes, and infrastructure.

Reliable Results

We deliver consistent, high-quality excavation services, minimizing delays and maximizing efficiency.

Safety First

Stringent safety protocols and experienced personnel ensure a safe work environment for everyone.

Transparent Pricing

Clear, upfront estimates with no hidden fees. You'll know exactly what to expect.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Mc New Excavating did a fantastic job excavating the foundation for our new home in Federal Hill. They were professional, efficient, and very careful to avoid damaging the surrounding property. The team clearly communicated each step of the process and answered all of our questions. Highly recommend!

Sarah M. Foundation Excavation
“

We hired Mc New to prepare our site for a new commercial building downtown. They handled the clearing, grading, and compaction with precision. There were a few minor delays due to weather, but they kept us informed and worked hard to get the project back on schedule. Overall, very satisfied with their work.

David K. Site Preparation
“

Mc New Excavating handled the trenching and utility installation for our new gas line. They were incredibly professional and efficient. The crew was respectful of my property and cleaned up thoroughly after the job was done. Will definitely use them again for future projects.

Jessica L. Trenching and Utility Installation
“

The team at Mc New Excavating made a difficult demolition project look easy. They demolished an old shed in my backyard safely and efficiently. Their communication was excellent throughout the process, and they left the site clean and ready for new construction. Great service!

Michael B. Demolition Services
“

Mc New Excavating cleared a large area of land for our new landscaping project. They removed all the trees and brush quickly and efficiently. There was some minor damage to the lawn, but they repaired it promptly. I would recommend their services.

Emily R. Land Clearing
“

After years of dealing with a flooded basement, Mc New Excavating installed a fantastic drainage system. They were professional, knowledgeable, and very thorough. They explained the process clearly and answered all my questions. My basement is now dry as a bone!

Robert S. Drainage Solutions

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What is involved in site preparation?
Site preparation includes clearing vegetation, removing debris, grading the land to the correct elevation, and compacting the soil to create a stable base for construction.
Why is proper site preparation important?
Proper site preparation ensures a stable foundation, prevents drainage issues, and allows for efficient construction, ultimately saving time and money.
Do you handle erosion control?
Yes, we implement comprehensive erosion control measures to protect the surrounding environment and comply with local regulations.
